entries.topic: Empiricist Sweep — 9 corpus sweeps characterized, Tathāgata AQ correct, FOOM 0% recovery all runs
M3 Phase 1–3 Status — Closed-loop, centroid benchmark, PD batch
entries.summary: Phase 1 (closed-loop KS): 1/9 = 11.1% accuracy, Z2-breaker the only hit. Phase 2 (KS-MIR benchmark): 10 zones, 7.4× centroid span (856 → 6303 Hz). Phase 3: JACK dummy confirmed, Pd 0.56.2 batch (-batch + -send) partially decoded, tabwrite→soundfiler→WAV path documented, [pd quit] blocked. All /tmp artifacts archived in m3-phase1-3-status.md.

entries.topic: Sample Rate Mismatch Fix and Pipeline Standardization
entries.summary: Successfully diagnosed and fixed critical sample rate mismatch in numogram audio pipeline. Updated mod_writer/utils.py to use 44100 Hz default instead of 8363 Hz, and removed hardcoded 8363 values from cli.py and composer.py. Verified pipeline works correctly with 44.1 kHz audio. Updated relevant skill documentation to reflect changes.
